title: WH_ERROR_* range hardcoded; new wolfHSM error codes misclassified
description: error.rs line 39 hardcodes -2302..=-2000 as the WH_ERROR_* range. The C header constant names are not referenced anywhere. wolfHSM has already grown to -2302; any future expansion silently routes new Wh errors into the Ffi variant. Callers matching on WolfHsmError::Wh{} will silently miss new error codes and log misleading 'FFI function failed' messages naming the wrong C function. No comment records which wolfhsm header version this range was read from.
